channel.title: Tarash Agarwal
channel.description: Lets build a new world on a click!

item.title: All About Caching and Proxies
item.description: When it comes to scale the data serving cacpacity of a system, caching plays the most important part.

item.title: Moving from Monolith to Microservice
item.description: The alternate to monolith ie microservice is in the air nowdays. At my current job I am leading the project to migrate from monolithic to microservice architecture and have made a list of various problems that I feel that we aim to solve by migrating to this architecture. I will share the list soon once I convinced that we have listed out enough reasons.

item.title: The Database Scaling Problem
item.description: As the most important tables in the database becomes huge, what is the solution?
